market_summary: S&P 500 +0.58% to 7563, Nasdaq +0.91%, Dow +0.05%. Markets recovered from morning dip after PCE inflation data came in largely in line. AI/software stocks led (MSFT/ORCL/PLTR +3-4%), financials lagged (V/BLK -2%). Snowflake +30% on strong outlook. US-Iran 60-day ceasefire MOU reportedly agreed, easing oil premium. Bond yields eased. PCE inflation rose to 3-year high but market shrugged it off.
key_events_tomorrow: May 29 (Friday): No major US economic releases scheduled
Month-end rebalancing flows expected (last trading day of May)
Memorial Day weekend approaching - lower liquidity expected
Watch for US-Iran ceasefire deal developments
overnight_risks: Iran ceasefire deal could collapse - oil spike risk
PCE inflation at 3-year high may shift Fed rhetoric
Month-end portfolio rebalancing could cause unusual moves
BTC ETF outflows 6 consecutive days (.26B) - could accelerate

instrument_news.XAG-USD: Silver correcting from highs. BofA target 35-09 year-end (bullish), UBS cut to 0 (cautious). 5th consecutive year supply deficit. Industrial demand (solar/EV/AI) accelerating. COT longs high but not extreme. Gold-silver ratio compressing as expected.
instrument_news.XAU-USD: Gold +1.04% to 528. Institutional forecasters still see 000. Central bank buying structural, not cyclical. Iran ceasefire would reduce safe-haven bid. FOMC Jun 16 key catalyst.
instrument_news.BTC-USD: Trading ~3K, down from 7K range. MVRV Z-Score 0.41 (fair value). ETF outflows .26B over 6 days. Short-term bearish (52% of 23 signals). Support 3-75K. MSTR holds 843,738 BTC (4% of total supply).
instrument_news.ETH-USD: Trading ~989, down 53% from ATH. Whale accumulation 140K ETH (22M in 96h). DeFi TVL 5.74B (68% dominance). Glamsterdam upgrade June 2026 could triple L1 throughput. 37M ETH staked (30% supply). Structurally bullish but near-term weak.
instrument_news.MSTR: At 54.70, BTC treasury 843,738 BTC worth ~9.1B (128% of market cap). Recent purchase 535 BTC on May 11. Stock tracks BTC with leverage - bearish while BTC weak.

metals_outlook: Bullish medium-term. Gold at 528 with institutional targets to 000. Silver supply deficit structural. Central bank buying persistent. Iran ceasefire MOU could temporarily reduce safe-haven premium but structural drivers intact. FOMC Jun 16 key: hawkish hold expected given PCE, but 8-4 dissent suggests eventual cuts. Watch gold-silver ratio for compression continuation.
oil_outlook: Brent ~3, WTI ~1. US-Iran 60-day ceasefire MOU reported - would gradually reopen Strait of Hormuz and normalize energy exports. If deal holds, downward pressure on oil (0-70 target per JPM). If deal collapses, 20+ spike risk. UAE exit from OPEC+ adds supply uncertainty. Net: bearish bias with geopolitical tail risk.
sentiment_shift: Risk-on tilt. Equity markets at new records. PCE inflation elevated but market looking through it. Iran ceasefire reduces tail risk. AI trade dominating (MSFT/ORCL/PLTR). Crypto weak near-term but fair-value per on-chain. Month-end rebalancing may cause temporary dislocations.
